caption: - Miniplates provide greater anchorage, as they are secured to a wider base with two to three screws fixed in thicker bone areas where ordinary bone remodeling tends to occurs slowly when compared to other areas, as depicted by the images. Clinical case granted by Dr. Ertty Silva.
